tasks.instruction: Enroll in the highest-rated productivity program that costs $200 or less and lasts at least 4 weeks.

tasks.instruction: Create three SMART goals—one each in health, career, and relationships—each with a clear measurable target and a deadline within the next 6 months.

tasks.instruction: Build a weekly routine that includes at least five habits tagged as mindfulness or productivity, each scheduled on at least three weekdays with a specific reminder time.

tasks.instruction: Save five stress management articles published within the last 12 months that each have an estimated reading time of 10 minutes or less to your reading list.

target_names: Beating Daily Stress in Five-Minute Micro-Moments

A 10-Minute Evening Routine to Unwind After Work
